raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The legislation aims to prevent student suicide, which is the second leading cause of death among 10 to 24 year olds.",
    "Teachers and school staff need training to recognize warning signs of suicide and respond appropriately.",
    "AB 2639 would direct the California Department of Education to identify evidence-based, online suicide prevention training programs.",
    "The training program must address the needs of high-risk groups, including youth bereaved by suicide and LGBTQ youth.",
    "LGBTQ youth are at very high risk for suicide, especially when they belong to other high-risk communities.",
    "The legislation will provide funding for training that focuses on high-risk students and intervention strategies.",
    "School staff spend roughly 1,000 hours per year with students, placing them in a prime position to recognize warning signs of suicide.",
    "The National Strategy for Suicide Prevention recognizes the unique position of teachers in preventing suicide."
  ]
}
```
